title: 7 Herbal Tinctures For Difficulty Swallowing
description: Astragalus membranaceus tinctures contains active constituents like astragaloside and flavonoids. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling in the throat and esophagus, making it easier to swallow. Astragalus membranaceus also contains saponins, which can help soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the throat, reducing irritation and discomfort.
